twitter_thread: I hit 60fps on eink with Modos Flow and an STM32F407, a $15 chip.
8-bit MCUs top out at 20fps with Modos Flow, a 3x performance gap.
Pairing Modos Flow with an STM32F767 doubles the frame rate to 120fps.
Quad SPI interface on Modos Flow reduces data transfer time by 75%.
A custom 256-entry LUT boosts eink waveform efficiency by 30% on Modos Flow.
What's the highest frame rate you've achieved with Modos Flow in a project? #modosflow #eink
Have you found a fix for ghosting on eink displays with Modos Flow? #eink
pack.linkedin: Using Modos Flow with an STM32F407, I achieved 60fps on an eink display, with a 3x performance boost over 8-bit MCUs. The quad SPI interface reduced data transfer time by 75%, and a custom 256-entry LUT improved waveform efficiency by 30%. What specific challenges have you overcome when working with Modos Flow and eink displays?
tiktok_hooks: 60fps eink is real, I did it with a $15 STM32 chip and Modos Flow.
Modos Flow with quad SPI is 4x faster than SPI, don't settle for slow.
STM32 and Modos Flow, the secret to fast eink displays.
pack.reddit_headline: Can Modos Flow push eink displays to 120fps with the right hardware?
